monthlyFlagships.title: The Wing Roast
monthlyFlagships.description: Local funnyman Big Sal Marchetti roasts contestants as the wings get hotter, one round at a time. Drink the milk, you're out — last mouth standing wins bragging rights and a pair of tickets to Big Sal's next show.

monthlyFlagships.title: Craft Beer Tasting
monthlyFlagships.description: A rotating lineup of seasonal and hard-to-find brews, guided by our own staff. Come with an open mind and leave with a new favorite.

monthlyFlagships.title: Piece of Cake
monthlyFlagships.description: Teams race the clock on a 300-piece puzzle, no box-lid peeking allowed. Fastest table wins a round of drinks on the house — and an actual cake, because we don't do irony halfway.

monthlyFlagships.title: Craft Sausage Tasting
monthlyFlagships.description: Small plates, big flavors. Sample our traditional, exotic, and seasonal links side by side — including a few specials you won't find on the regular menu.

monthlyFlagships.title: Da Coach Watch Party
monthlyFlagships.description: Bears preseason kicks off, and so does our Mike Ditka lookalike contest — free beer to whoever channels Da Coach best. Mustache optional, scowl mandatory.

monthlyFlagships.title: Fantasy Draft HQ Kickoff
monthlyFlagships.description: Free WiFi, a full bar, and zero judgment if you draft a kicker in the third round. Bring your laptop, your league, and your worst trash talk.

monthlyFlagships.title: Craft Beer Tasting
monthlyFlagships.description: A rotating lineup of seasonal and hard-to-find brews, guided by our own staff. Come with an open mind and leave with a new favorite.

monthlyFlagships.title: Northshore Takeover Night
monthlyFlagships.description: Northshore Ale Works takes over our taps for the night, pouring their full lineup alongside ours. Meet the brewers, compare notes, and find your new favorite without leaving the bar.

monthlyFlagships.title: Craft Sausage Tasting
monthlyFlagships.description: Small plates, big flavors. Sample our traditional, exotic, and seasonal links side by side — including a few specials you won't find on the regular menu.

monthlyFlagships.title: The Second City Solstice Returns
monthlyFlagships.description: Our winter warmer returns for the season — dark, rich, and built for standing around outside Wrigley in December. Available only through the new year, so don't sleep on it.
